stepAnswer: Right triangles contain one $$90-degree$$ angle, while oblique triangles do not contain any $$90-degree$$ angles.
stepTitle: Which statement best compares right triangles and oblique triangles?
choices: Right triangles contain one $$90-degree$$ angle, while oblique triangles do not contain any $$90-degree$$ angles.
Right triangles have all angles less than $$90$$ degrees, while oblique triangles have at least one angle greater than $$90$$ degrees.
Oblique triangles are a special type of right triangle.
Right triangles are always isosceles, while oblique triangles are always scalene.
